title: W.A.N.T.E.D
fullTitle: Watch and Analyze Nationwide Trends in Evolving Deviance
domain: Crime Intelligence | Geospatial Analytics | Cloud-Native AI
description: Cloud-native crime evolution analysis system using AI, geospatial tools, and real-time data pipelines. Introduces 'Crime Genome' — vectorized crime profile modeling.
overview: W.A.N.T.E.D is a cloud-native system built to analyze, visualize, and forecast crime evolution patterns across India using AI models, geospatial tools, and real-time data pipelines. It introduces the concept of a 'Crime Genome' – vectorized crime profile modeling that treats crime patterns as structured, analyzable entities rather than raw event logs.

features.label: Crime Genome
features.description: Vectorized crime profile modeling treating crime patterns as structured entities.

features.label: Semantic Vector-Based Search
features.description: Using Sentence Transformers for semantic crime search.

features.label: Interactive Geospatial Visualization
features.description: Heatmaps and network graphs via Folium.

algorithms.name: Crime Genome Vectorization
algorithms.description: Structured vector representation of crime patterns for analysis.

algorithms.name: Semantic Search
algorithms.description: Sentence Transformer embeddings for crime pattern similarity.

algorithms.name: GPU Anomaly Detection
algorithms.description: cuML-accelerated outlier detection on crime data.

results: Semantic search across crime patterns functional
